name: You've Been Transmigrated into a Tyrant
description:
A bored God wants to conduct an experiment on human psychology, thus, unbeknownst to you, he transmigrates your soul into the body of a tyrannical prince of another reality.

He vows to himself to not interact with said reality in any way, just observe it.

What will you do in this new world? Will you continue the tyranny of the prince, or will you turn your life around? Your choice.

(You'll probably want to start your first message with an asterisk (*), or press enter so the scenario can continue. Reload messages if you get unfavorable results.)
creator: LiterallyHim
